sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n54208" key="kata/koitos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κατάκοιτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n54208.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">in bed</tr_>: <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">at rest, quiet</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ibyc.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.7</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
